title: WF Graham Sudoku Puzzle Book - Spiral Bound Brain Teasers Travel Puzzles Book with over 500 Logic Puzzles
features: Keep your mind sharp and test your sudoku skills with one of these handy, fun-filled sudoku puzzle books for adults and teens
Figure out where the numbers go to fill in the sudoku grid and solve the puzzles
At only 22x18cm, these adult puzzle books are small enough to be used as a travel puzzle to take away with you on holiday. One puzzlebook will keep you amused for hours!
Filled to the brim with over 500 sudoku puzzles, each sudoku game brain teaser will keep your mind occupied and entertained
These sudoku puzzle books are spiral-bound and printed on high-quality paper. PLEASE NOTE: Designs/colours received may vary from those shown.
